name: Never on Sunday Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring cream and half and half to a simmer in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Add sugar and cocoa; stir until sugar dissolves. Remove from heat.
3. Add chocolate, stirring until smooth.
4. Gradually whisk half of the chocolate mixture into eggs.
5. Return the egg mixture to the saucepan.
6. Stir over medium-low heat for 10-15 minutes or until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
7. Strain the custard into a bowl and allow it to cool completely, stirring often.
8. Stir in whiskey.
9. Pour the custard into an ice cream churn and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
10. Store the ice cream in a covered container for several hours to mellow the flavor. If frozen solid, soften in the refrigerator before serving.
